Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
